title: Confirmation before sending automated email
excerpt: We have many automations that automatically send emails. Could we get a popup with “are you sure you want to send this automated email?” before sending the email? The popup could be enabled or disabled in the automations…

posts.author: AlexandreLopez (Alexandre Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have many automations that automatically send emails. Could we get a popup with “are you sure you want to send this automated email?” before sending the email? The popup could be enabled or disabled in the automations window of the respective automation.

The reason for this is that sometimes employees misclick the wrong status, which we don’t want to immediately send out the wrong email to the customer.

posts.author: bmat (Ben)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be very helpful for automated emails and SMS in case we move a contact to the wrong status by accident.
